title: Iran's Pezeshkian: will not enter 'forced negotiations' under pressure and blockade
snippet: Iran President Masoud Pezeshkian said Tehran will not enter 'forced negotiations' while facing pressure and threats. He demanded Washington first remove 'operational obstacles, including the blockade' of ships traveling to and from Iranian ports before any talks can proceed.
tag_reason: 페제시키안의 '강제 협상 불가' 선언은 4/22 '딜 개방' 신호(src-392)에서 강경화로 역전. 신규 입장 표명.
